lines.speaker: Ogre guard
lines.text: Hey yous tryin' not to get da sickies else yous be da sick-un and mebe get to be a dead-un if yous be da unlucky fing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry, I know how to take care of myself.

lines.speaker: Ogre guard
lines.text: I's is guardin' da coffins-ies- make sure no fieves nick stuff from 'em. If dey's do, dey get's bashed and shoved down da big 'ole and get deaded by da zogries in da deadies place. So yous creature be wares...ok!

lines.speaker: Ogre guard
lines.text: Da Zogries comes from da deadies place - deys attacking all da jig-dancers wot do da god stuff... jiggin an all. Dem zogries gonna dead all on us wiv da sickies.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are these coffins doing here?

lines.speaker: Ogre guard
lines.text: We's grabbed da closes dead-uns to stop da zogries gettin' em..de'se dead-uns coffins got da old-uns boneses and older-stuff in 'em, Grish seys we's needs to guard 'em...I's does what Grish seys.

lines.speaker: Ogre guard
lines.text: Me's was born angry....me's wantin' to dead many peples...is what ogries meant to do...
